title: elaeocarpus trichophyllus
intro: Elaeocarpus trichophyllus, also known as the small-leaved blueberry ash or blueberry ash, is a plant species native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus trichophyllus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
